---
title: "Emergent Intelligence"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/
---

This site serves as a live repository for my experiments in swarm intelligence, cellular automata, and neural architectures. 

Use the **Projects** dropdown menu above to explore specific project dashboards, or browse my open-source codebases via GitHub.
